rulings.Case Title: JEREMY KOEHLER VS. WELLS FARGO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, March 23, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANT BARCLAYS CAPITAL REAL ESTATE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the second cause of action. Plaintiff fails to adequately apprise defendants of the claims alleged. Demurrer overruled as to the first, third, and fifth causes of action, and moot as to the 7th cause of action. =(302/CWW/JW)
